targets.rawSql: SELECT event_type, sum(events) AS c FROM order_events_daily WHERE day >= today() - 7 GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY c DESC
SELECT hour, worker_id, avgMerge(gpu_util) AS util FROM worker_metrics_hourly WHERE hour > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY hour, worker_id ORDER BY hour
SELECT day, event, sum(events) AS events FROM mobile_analytics_daily WHERE day >= today() - 14 GROUP BY day, event ORDER BY day
SELECT event, sum(events) AS total FROM mobile_analytics_daily WHERE day >= today() - 7 GROUP BY event ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT screen, sum(events) AS views FROM mobile_analytics_screen_daily WHERE day >= today() - 7 GROUP BY screen ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT 30
